response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a cover performance of "FLY HIGH!!" by Ayunda Risu, originally by BURNOUT SYNDROMES.
2. Verified the song title and artist through web search using lyrics snippets and context.
3. Found the original Japanese lyrics and English translation for "FLY HIGH!!" using a dedicated search for BURNOUT SYNDROMES lyrics.
4. Mapped the entire video as a single continuous musical performance scene.
response.global_summary: A music video performance featuring Ayunda Risu performing a cover of "FLY HIGH!!" by BURNOUT SYNDROMES. The video shows Risu riding a dragon and scenes of her battling a creature.

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu performing a cover of "FLY HIGH!!" while riding a dragon, with lyrics appearing on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
飛べ FLY HIGH!!
汗と血と涙で光る翼で
今全部全部置キ去って
飛べ FLY 高く FLY
最果ての未来へ
傷だらけの若鳥が
空を睨んでる
低空飛行する奴らが笑おうと
海の果てが見たい
心を無にして向かい風に乗り
助走をつけて
ホップステップジャンプで
飛べ FLY HIGH!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tobe FLY HIGH!!
With wings glowing with sweat, blood, and tears
Leave all that behind
Fly, FLY high, FLY high
To the farthest future
The young bird covered in wounds
Gazes up at the sky
Even if those who fly low laugh
I want to see the end of the sea
Clear your mind, ride the headwind
And get a running start
With a hop, step, and jump
Fly high!!
